title: Vessel detection and oil-spill monitoring for maritime surveillance
summary: SAR imagery supports detection of vessels and oil spills for surveillance and environmental protection.
description:
Authorities monitoring large maritime areas for illegal activity, accidents and pollution cannot rely on patrols or cooperative tracking alone. Non-cooperative vessels and spills can go undetected over vast areas.

Sentinel-1 SAR imagery detects vessels and oil slicks regardless of cloud or darkness, while CMEMS current and wind data support drift modelling. Together they enable wide-area surveillance, spill-response planning and environmental enforcement.

site.integration_detail: Sentinel-1 SAR scenes are processed with detection algorithms for vessels and slicks; CMEMS drift data supports response. Copernicus imagery needs algorithmic processing before it is actionable.
